title: Zhou Wutai
content:
History
[
]

Wang Lin
 first meet him while he was trying to comprehend life and death domain as a mortal. He was one of the 4 chosen of 
Yunque Zi
 to becomes the next suzaku. He has the inheritance of a green dragon. Zhou Wutai finnaly becames the 15th Suzaku after 
Zhuque Zi
. It was Wang Lin who decided to passed it to him.
